ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  "prerequisite_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite topic */,
  "estimated_time_hours" REAL /* Estimated time to cover the topic in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_prerequisite_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_name" TEXT /* Name of the reading */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the reading */,
  "reading_url" TEXT /* URL of the reading material */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reading is required or optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "max_attempts" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attempts allowed for the assignment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assignment for grading purposes */,
  "prerequisite_assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_prerequisite_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number of the submission */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission was late */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback given to the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES project_feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the project */,
  "max_attempts" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attempts allowed for the project */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the project for grading purposes */,
  "prerequisite_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_prerequisite_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_submissions" (
  "project_submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project submission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number of the submission */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission was late */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback given to the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_submissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_submissions_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES project_feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "project_submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project submission the feedback belongs to */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given to the student */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who provided the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_feedback_project_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_submission_id") REFERENCES project_submissions ("project_submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
